jd_text:
Job description
Responsibilities

Design, develop, test, and deploy software features for AI-powered applications
Build and maintain frontend and backend systems
Integrate APIs, databases, and third-party services
Collaborate with founders and team members to define product requirements
Participate in code reviews and technical discussions
Debug issues and improve application performance
Research and implement emerging AI technologies and tools
Contribute to product architecture and technical decision-making
Required Skills & Qualifications

Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field
Proficiency in at least one programming language such as Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, or C++
Understanding of software development fundamentals, including data structures and algorithms
Familiarity with Git and version control workflows
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks
Preferred Qualifications

Experience with React, Next.js, Node.js, or similar frameworks
Experience working with REST APIs and databases
Familiarity with AI/ML concepts, LLMs, or generative AI tools
Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud
Personal projects, hackathons, startup experience, or open-source contributions
What You'll Gain

Direct mentorship from startup founders
Ivy League connections
Experience building production-ready AI products
Exposure to startup operations, product development, and customer feedback
Significant ownership and impact on company growth
Opportunity for future full-time employment based on performance
Ideal Candidate

We're looking for someone who is curious, self-motivated, and excited about artificial intelligence and software development. The ideal candidate enjoys solving challenging technical problems and wants to help shape products from concept to launch.
